title: Title
subscriber-intro: Here is the text that explains the process (subscription.subscriber-intro)
no-active-subscription: You don't have an active subscription at the moment

subscription-details: Your subscription is valid until :date inclusively
renewal_email_body: Your subscription expires on :date. To renew or cancel it, go to your profile: :url
option_renewal_email_body: Your monthly ":option" option expires on :date. To keep it for another month, renew it here: :url — without renewal it will be removed from your listing (and its logo will disappear next to your name).
cancel-at-term-end: Your subscription stays active until the end of the term, with no renewal and no refund.
